transactions.desc: The Rangers activated Winn from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Cardinals activated Church (shoulder) from the injured list Tuesday, reports Jim Hayes of FanDuel Sports Network Midwest.
The Red Sox reinstated Whitlock (knee) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday, Gabrielle Starr of the Boston Herald reports.
The Red Sox optioned Siegler to Triple-A Worcester on Tuesday, reports Ian Browne of MLB.com.
The Mets optioned Senger to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets reinstated Alvarez (knee) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports. He's starting behind the plate and batting ninth Tuesday against the Cardinals
The Brewers agreed to a seven-year, $31 million contract extension with Lara on Tuesday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
The White Sox optioned Nishida to Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox recalled Rock from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox optioned Sandlin to Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox selected Montgomery's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Wagner from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The Astros recalled Loperfido from Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Cubs selected Kelly's contract Monday.
The Cardinals optioned Scott to Triple-A Memphis on Monday.
The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Taylor Rashi to the Minnesota Twins.
The Twins acquired Rashi from the Diamondbacks on Monday in exchange for cash considerations, Nick Piecoro of The Arizona Republic reports.
The Angels selected Mancini's contract from Triple-A Salt Lake, and he will start at first base and bat seventh against the Astros on Monday.
The Angels recalled Guzman from Triple-A Salt Lake and he will start at second base and bat fifth in Monday's game against the Astros.
The Athletics activated Muncy (hand) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Athletics optioned Hernaiz to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
Woodford cleared waivers Monday and elected to enter free agency in lieu of accepting an outright assignment to Triple-A Nashville, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Brewers optioned Yoho to Triple-A Nashville on Monday.
The Astros recalled Whitcomb from Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday.
The Blue Jays activated Nance (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Mariners recalled Bliss from Triple-A Tacoma on Monday.
The Cubs optioned Alcantara to Triple-A Iowa on Monday, Tommy Birch of the Des Moines Register reports.
The Blue Jays designated Rodriguez for assignment Monday.
The Red Sox recalled Eaton from Triple-A Worcester on Monday.
The Red Sox optioned La Sorsa to Triple-A Worcester on Monday.
